matches.matched_text: For all us kids under his aegis.
matches.snippet: For all us kids under his aegis.
matches.reasoning: 'his' refers to HCE/the sleeping giant; 'aegis' (protection/rule) suggests the paternal authority of the recumbent hero whose body encompasses Dublin

matches.matched_text: At Tam Fanagan's weak yat his still's going Strang.
matches.snippet: At Tam Fanagan's weak yat his still's going Strang.
matches.reasoning: 'Fanagan' echoes Finnegan; 'Tam' (Tom) appears elsewhere; 'still' evokes whiskey (the wake reviver); running/going suggests Finnegan's mobility in the nocturnal/magical space

matches.snippet: where every feaster's a Foster's other, fiannians all.
matches.reasoning: Direct reference to 'Fianna' or Fenians—Finn's legendary warrior band; conflates them into the democratic feast of HCE's world

matches.snippet: The wellingbreast, he willing giant, the mountain mourning his duggedy dew.
matches.reasoning: The 'willing giant' is the sleeping form in landscape; 'mountain mourning' echoes the giant's body as terrain; 'duggedy dew' suggests the water/fluid that falls from this recumbent form

matches.matched_text: the mountain mourning his duggedy dew
matches.snippet: The wellingbreast, he willing giant, the mountain mourning his duggedy dew.
matches.reasoning: Mountain = the sleeping giant's body; 'mourning' suggests the wake; dew/water = tears/fluids flowing from his form

matches.matched_text: Anna was at the beginning lives yet and will return after great deap sleap rerising
matches.snippet: For as Anna was at the beginning lives yet and will return after great deap sleap rerising
matches.reasoning: ALP (Anna Livia Plurabelle) parallels the eternal female; 'rerising' after 'great deep sleep' echoes the fall-and-resurrection motif; 'deap sleap' are garbled/onomatopoetic like thunderwords

matches.matched_text: We drames our dreams tell Bappy returns.
matches.snippet: We drames our dreams tell Bappy returns. And Sein annews.
matches.reasoning: 'Bappy' may echo Finnegan-as-baby or the sleeping giant awaiting revival; 'returns' = resurrection; 'Sein annews' (being/existence renews) suggests cyclical rebirth

matches.snippet: So shuttle the pipers done. Eric aboy!
matches.reasoning: 'Eric aboy' plays on 'Erica' or 'I wreck a boy' or 'airíonn' (Gaelic); unclear direct Finn link but cryptic wake-motif language

matches.matched_text: Pot price pon patrilinear plop, if the osseletion of the onkring gives omen nome.
matches.snippet: But Erigureen is ever. Pot price pon patrilinear plop, if the osseletion of the onkring gives omen nome.
matches.reasoning: 'onkring' may pun on 'oncoming' or 'omen' itself; cryptic phrasing typical of Joycean wordplay but Finn connection indirect
